name: oh-story-claudecode
description: Chinese web-novel writing toolkit adapted for Codex while keeping upstream Claude Code skills intact.

interface.shortDescription: Chinese web-novel writing skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A full Chinese web-novel workflow for market scanning, story deconstruction, long-form and short-form writing, AI-tone cleanup, review, import, cover generation, and browser-assisted research. The Codex adapter keeps upstream Claude Code behavior intact and adds Codex-specific project guidance.
defaultPrompt: /story 帮我判断下一步该用哪个网文工具
/story-setup-codex 初始化 Codex 写作项目
/story-review 审查这章的爽点和一致性
